description: The object is a cylindrical can predominantly red in color with white Coca-Cola branding in white white. Coca-Cola logo prominently displayed on the front. The can has a smooth surface texture with a metallic sheen, suggesting a metallic finish. The dimensions appear to be approximately 0.15 * 0.15 * 0.1 meters, suggesting a small size.
